pricing: wstETH/ETH custom feed divided by Chainlink USDC/ETH feed, with scale adjustment through two proxy layers.
notes: Both underlying price feeds are real Chainlink contracts (stETH/ETH and USDC/ETH EACAggregatorProxy). The WstETHPriceFeed is a third-party adapter deployed by Compound Deployer 5 (not Chainlink) that wraps Chainlink stETH/ETH and multiplies by wstETH.stEthPerToken(); it is immutable, verified, and battle-tested by Compound before Morpho adopted it. Two Ownable proxy layers (ProxyOracle and ScaledProxyOracle) add delegate-upgrade risk. The underlying ChainlinkOracle is immutable with hardcoded feed addresses.
